hooks.command: bash -c 'BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"command\",\"\"))"); if [[ "$BRANCH" == "main" ]] && echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git (commit|push)"; then echo "Blocked: direct commits/pushes to main are not allowed. Checkout a feature branch first." >&2; exit 1; fi'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"file_path\",\"\"))"); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(ts|tsx)$"; then cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && npm run typecheck 2>&1 | tail -5; fi'
